interfaces.name: getHomeContent
interfaces.description: Get homepage content including featured attractions, events, promotions, and basic event info.

interfaces.name: globalSearch
interfaces.description: Search attractions, events, and merch from the global search bar.

interfaces.name: getTicketsAttractionsViewOptions
interfaces.description: Get available view modes and filter options for the Tickets & Attractions listing page.

interfaces.name: getTicketsAttractionsListing
interfaces.description: List ticketed attractions for the Tickets & Attractions page with filters and view mode.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Selected date in 'YYYY-MM-DD' for tickets view.

interfaces.name: getAttractionDetailAndTimeslots
interfaces.description: Get full attraction details and available timeslots for a specific date with filtering and sorting.

interfaces.name: getAttractionPricingPreview
interfaces.description: Calculate a pricing preview for a ticket configuration including ticket type, quantity/party size, add-ons, and optional promo code.

parameters.name: quantity
parameters.description: Number of individual tickets when not using party_size.

parameters.name: party_size
parameters.description: Total number of players/guests for group tickets such as escape rooms.

interfaces.name: addTicketsToCart
interfaces.description: Add configured tickets for a specific attraction timeslot to the shopping cart, handling cart creation internally and applying any promo code to the line item.

parameters.name: quantity
parameters.description: Number of tickets when not using party_size.

parameters.name: party_size
parameters.description: For group-based tickets like escape rooms.

interfaces.name: addAttractionToFavorites
interfaces.description: Save an attraction to the single-user favorites collection.

interfaces.name: removeAttractionFromFavorites
interfaces.description: Remove an attraction from the favorites collection.

interfaces.name: getFavoritesList
interfaces.description: Get the list of saved attractions in the favorites collection, with summary information.

interfaces.name: getCartSummary
interfaces.description: Get the current shopping cart contents, grouped by item type, with quantities, prices, and fulfillment options.

interfaces.name: updateCartItemQuantity
interfaces.description: Update the quantity or party size of a cart item.

parameters.name: quantity
parameters.description: New quantity for merch or per-person tickets.

parameters.name: party_size
parameters.description: New party size for group-based tickets like escape rooms.

interfaces.name: removeCartItem
interfaces.description: Remove a line item from the cart, including any associated ParkingPass or ticket holds.

interfaces.name: setCartMerchDeliveryMethod
interfaces.description: Set or change the delivery method for merchandise items in the cart.

interfaces.name: getCheckoutSummary
interfaces.description: Get checkout summary with all items, totals, applied promo codes, and current merch delivery method.

interfaces.name: placeOrder
interfaces.description: Finalize checkout, create an order from the current cart, and process payment.

parameters.name: merch_delivery_method
parameters.description: e.g., 'ship_to_address', 'pick_up_at_event_venue'. Overrides cart value if provided.

interfaces.name: getMerchCategories
interfaces.description: Get merchandise categories for the shop navigation, including Apparel.

interfaces.name: getMerchFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for the merch listing page such as price range and rating options.

interfaces.name: listMerchProducts
interfaces.description: List merch products with category, price, rating, and search filters.

interfaces.name: getMerchProductDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a merchandise product, including images, description, price, rating, and options.

interfaces.name: addMerchToCart
interfaces.description: Add a merch product to the shopping cart with quantity and selected options.

interfaces.name: getEventFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filters and view modes for the event calendar and workshops listing page.

interfaces.name: listEvents
interfaces.description: List events for the event calendar page given date range, time range, price, tags, and view mode.

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: Filter events starting after this time, e.g., '17:00'.

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: Filter events starting before this time, e.g., '22:00'.

is_in_night_plan.description: Whether this event is already in My Night Plan.

interfaces.name: getEventDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific event or workshop.

interfaces.name: addEventToNightPlan
interfaces.description: Add an event to the single-user My Night Plan.

interfaces.name: removeEventFromNightPlan
interfaces.description: Remove an event from My Night Plan.

interfaces.name: getNightPlan
interfaces.description: Get the current My Night Plan, listing events in chronological order and indicating overlaps.

interfaces.name: reorderNightPlan
interfaces.description: Update the ordering of items in My Night Plan (UI may still display chronologically).

interfaces.name: registerForWorkshop
interfaces.description: Submit a free registration for a workshop event such as the Zombie Makeup Workshop.

interfaces.name: searchVenuesOnMap
interfaces.description: Search for venues by name on the map (e.g., 'Quarantine Zone Arena') and return matching pins.

interfaces.name: getVenueDetail
interfaces.description: Get details for a specific venue, used in the map venue details panel.

interfaces.name: findNearbyParkingAreas
interfaces.description: Find parking areas near a specified venue within a maximum distance.

interfaces.name: getParkingAreaDetail
interfaces.description: Get details for a specific parking area selected from the map.

interfaces.name: addParkingPassToCart
interfaces.description: Create a parking pass for a specific parking area, date, and arrival time, then add it to the cart.

interfaces.name: getPageViewPreference
interfaces.description: Get the last-selected view mode preference for a given page, such as tickets_page or schedule_page.

interfaces.name: savePageViewPreference
interfaces.description: Save the current view mode preference for a page, such as selecting tickets vs attractions or all_events vs workshops.

interfaces.name: getAboutEventContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the About the Event page including story, attraction types, dates, location, accessibility, and safety.

interfaces.name: getContactInfo
interfaces.description: Get contact and support information including email, phone, address, and links to FAQ and policies.

interfaces.name: submitContactForm
interfaces.description: Submit a general inquiry via the contact form.

interfaces.name: getFAQEntries
interfaces.description: Get FAQ entries covering tickets, age restrictions, scare levels, parking, and accessibility.

interfaces.name: getPoliciesContent
interfaces.description: Get legal policy content for terms, privacy, or refunds.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateCart
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load the existing cart for the single user or create a new one if none exists.

helperFunctions.name: _calculateTicketLineTotal
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to compute ticket line totals based on timeslot pricing, ticket options, quantity or party size, and add-ons.

helperFunctions.name: _applyPromoCodeToLineItem
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to validate a promo code and apply its discount rules to a specific cart line item.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateNightPlan
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load or initialize the single-user NightPlan record.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateFavoritesCollection
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load or initialize the single-user FavoritesCollection.

helperFunctions.name: _createParkingPassForCart
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to create a ParkingPass entity for a given parking area and arrival datetime in 'in_cart' status.
